user.description: Select the Hatch Rest to add.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

abort.no_devices_found: No Hatch Rest devices found. Make sure the device is powered on and in range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device to verify it. Make sure it is in range and not connected to the Hatch app, then try again.
abort.not_supported: This Hatch device does not support local Bluetooth control. Only the 1st-gen Rest and Rest+ do; newer models are cloud-only (see the dahlb/ha_hatch integration).

data_description.poll_interval: How often Home Assistant reads state from the device. Changes made in Home Assistant always appear immediately; this only affects how quickly changes made elsewhere (e.g. the Hatch app) show up.
